basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NIT Warangal is recruiting 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post under ANRF project.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of notification.
qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E. in Civil Engg. + M.Tech/M.E. in Water Resources Engg. with first class (60% or 6.5 CGPA for GEN/OBC-NCL/GEN-EWS & 55% or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ST/PwD) OR B.Tech with 70% / 7.5 CGPA (GEN) or 65%/7.0 CGPA (SC/ST/PwD)

selection_process: Selection will be based on shortlisting of applications followed by Interview (Online or Offline). Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email/phone. Candidates must have good internet and camera facility for online interview.
how_to_apply: Download the application form from the given link.
Fill the form completely and attach Bio-data/CV + scanned copies of all certificates in a single PDF.
Submit through the Google Form and also send via email if required.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary. Selected candidate can register for Ph.D. at NIT Warangal as per institute rules. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Incomplete applications or applications received after the last date will not be considered. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NIT Warangal is recruiting 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post under ANRF project.

rows.national_institute_of_technology_nit_war: Towards Sustainable Reservoir Management in the Krishna River Basin
Rs. 37,000/- pm (1st & 2nd year), Rs. 42,000/- pm (3rd year) + HRA
Maximum 3 years or till project completion

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of notification.

rows.details: B.Tech/B.E. in Civil Engg. + M.Tech/M.E. in Water Resources Engg. with first class (60% or 6.5 CGPA for GEN/OBC-NCL/GEN-EWS & 55% or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ST/PwD) OR B.Tech with 70% / 7.5 CGPA (GEN) or 65%/7.0 CGPA (SC/ST/PwD)
GATE/UGC/CSIR/NET qualified + experience in Experimental Hydraulics, CFD, Open Channel Flow, Reservoir Sedimentation

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on shortlisting of applications followed by Interview (Online or Offline). Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email/phone. Candidates must have good internet and camera facility for online interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download the application form from the given link. Fill the form completely and attach Bio-data/CV + scanned copies of all certificates in a single PDF. Submit through the Google Form and also send via email if required. Google Form Link: https://forms.gle/YZjY94P8XQb5LYyg6 Application Form Download Link: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1y0gs2-pUE15jEsFK1g-DkmGsG9dmz5nJ?usp=sharing Email: [email protected]

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary. Selected candidate can register for Ph.D. at NIT Warangal as per institute rules. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Incomplete applications or applications received after the last date will not be considered. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 25 July 2026 till 11:59 PM through Google Form.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have B.Tech/B.E. in Civil Engineering and M.Tech/M.E. in Water Resources Engineering with minimum 60% marks / 6.5 CGPA (GEN/OBC) or equivalent relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for JRF at NIT Warangal ANRF Project?
faq.answer: Emoluments are Rs. 37,000/- per month for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month in the third year + HRA.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for NIT Warangal JRF 2026?
faq.answer: Maximum age is 30 years for GEN/GEN-EWS, 33 years for OBC-NCL, and 35 years for SC/ST/PwD/Female candidates.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for NIT Warangal JRF position under ANRF project?
faq.answer: Fill the application form, attach CV and certificates in a single PDF, and submit via the official Google Form link before the deadline.

faq.question: Q7. Is GATE qualification mandatory for NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment?
faq.answer: No, GATE score is not mandatory, though candidates with GATE/ NET qualification will be given preference.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent job at NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: No. It is a purely temporary project position for a maximum of 3 years or till project completion.

faq.question: Q9. Can selected JRF candidate pursue PhD at NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: Yes, selected candidates are eligible to register for Ph.D. at NIT Warangal as per institute rules.

faq.question: Q10. Who is the Principal Investigator for the ANRF project at NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: Dr. Laxmipriya Mohanty, Assistant Professor, Department of Civil Engineering, NIT Warangal.
